title: potentilla fruticosa f. ochroleuca
intro: Potentilla fruticosa f. ochroleuca, also known as yellow-leaved potentilla, is a variety of the potentilla fruticosa plant, a shrub native to Asia and Europe. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Potentilla fruticosa f. ochroleuca include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and reduce inflammation.
